title: Browser evidence interpretation (grounding, hallucination resistance, source fidelity)

criteria.description: Claims align with navigation, DOM excerpts, console, and screenshot metadata in the evidence JSON; cites specific URLs, selectors, or log lines.
Does not invent pages, elements, or errors that are absent from the structured evidence; clearly flags uncertainty when evidence is incomplete.
Preserves source ordering and labels from the trace; distinguishes fixture metadata from inferred user intent.
